Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Operative Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Alex Dibona; Exhibits
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KIM WHITWORTH'S Motion For Leave To Amend Operative Complaint

Plaintiff Kim Whitworth's unopposed Motion For Leave To Amend Operative Complaint is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on February 9, 2026. Plaintiff shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
